RULING: The matter was discussed. After hearing, the Court grants PLAINTIFF JESUS RIVAS' Motion For Attorney's Fees And Costs In Support Of Class Action Settlement. Counsel to submit a revised order and judgment. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.
